title: Directions under Section 35A read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 – The Bhavani Sahakari Bank Ltd., Mumbai – Extension of Period
description: The Reserve Bank of India issued Directions under Section 35A read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 to The Bhavani Sahakari Bank Ltd., Mumbai vide Directive No. CO.DOS.SED.No.S2770/12-22-023/2025-2026 dated July 03, 2025 for a period of six months up to close of business on January 04, 2026, which was last extended up to close of business on April 04, 2026, vide Directive No. DOR.MON/D-46/12-22-023/2025-2026 dated December 24, 2025. The Reserve Bank of India is satisfied that
